title: Proof Boundary — The Corpus Is Manufactured, Not Found
supported_claims: The Nelson Knowledge System has explicit source, proof, narrative, visual, publication, and derivative records.
The runtime is being implemented with platform-neutral domain models and repository interfaces.
Publishing is treated as a downstream output of a larger knowledge-manufacturing workflow.
unsupported_claims: The system has already produced measurable public reach or conversion outcomes.
The current GitHub runtime is the permanent production architecture.
All external integrations are fully operational.
